How do I update the charts
? These can be updated by modifying underlying dataset data. A link to the csv file can be found in the documentation on the left.
This Mock-CRM Analytics dashboard is designed to showcase the ability of CRM Analytics to provide a 360 view of an Account from a record page.
Due to limitations in existing Simple Demo Org (SDO) data, this dashboard runs mostly from static datasets and can be easily customized to fit your demo needs.
Full documentation is availalbe at the link below:
